revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 6 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 6 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月6日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[天正]]6年<!--（[[1578年]]_月_日）--> - [[織田信長]]の水軍が[[毛利氏]]と海戦。毛利水軍を破る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[嘉永]]元年（[[1848年]][[12月1日]]） - [[曲亭馬琴]]（滝沢馬琴）、[[小説家]]（* [[1767年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月5日 (旧暦)|11月5日]] 翌日[[11月7日 (旧暦)|11月7日]] - 前月[[10月6日 (旧暦)|10月6日]] 翌月[[12月6日 (旧暦)|12月6日]] *新暦[[11月6日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{stub}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] [[zh:十一月初六]] [[en:draft:November 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 6''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の6日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1578|ja|1578}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}） – 織田信長の水軍が毛利氏と海戦を行い、毛利水軍を破った.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1717|ja|1717}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – 長久保赤水、地理学者・漢学者（享年1801年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenpō|ja|建保}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1214|ja|1214}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – 佐々木高綱、武将（生年1160年）. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – 滝沢馬琴（服部半蔵とも）、小説家（生年1767年）.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|6|11|8|10|7|12|11|1107}}

[[sn:November 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] [[zh:十一月初六]] [[en:draft:November 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 6''' は、伝統的な{{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}の11月の6日目です。六曜は{{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}}で、その日は{{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}です.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1578|ja|1578}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}） – 織田信長の水軍が毛利氏と海戦を行い、毛利水軍を破った.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1717|ja|1717}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – 長久保赤水、地理学者・漢学者（享年1801年）.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenpō|ja|建保}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1214|ja|1214}} {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}） – 佐々木高綱、武将（生年1160年）. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1848|ja|1848}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – 滝沢馬琴（服部半蔵とも）、小説家（生年1767年）.

[[sn:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] [[zh:十一月初六]] [[en:draft:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] の水軍が[[毛利氏]] と海戦。[[毛利水軍]] を破る
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1717]] [[December 8]] ） - [[長久保赤水]] 、[[地理学]] 者・[[漢学者]] （+ [[1801]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1214]] [[December 8]] ） - [[佐々木高綱]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1160]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1848]] [[December 1]] ） - [[曲亭馬琴]] （滝沢馬琴）、[[Novelist]] （* [[1767]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|5|11|7|10|6|12|11|1106}}

[[sn:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] [[zh:十一月初六]] [[en:draft:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] の水軍が[[毛利氏]] と海戦。[[毛利水軍]] を破る
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1717]] [[December 8]] ） - [[長久保赤水]] 、[[地理学]] 者・[[漢学者]] （+ [[1801]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1214]] [[December 8]] ） - [[佐々木高綱]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1160]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1848]] [[December 1]] ） - [[曲亭馬琴]] （滝沢馬琴）、[[Novelist]] （* [[1767]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] [[zh:十一月初六]] [[en:draft:November 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] の水軍が[[毛利氏]] と海戦。[[毛利水軍]] を破る
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1717]] [[December 8]] ） - [[長久保赤水]] 、[[地理学]] 者・[[漢学者]] （+ [[1801]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1214]] [[December 8]] ） - [[佐々木高綱]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1160]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1848]] [[December 1]] ） - [[曲亭馬琴]] （滝沢馬琴）、[[Novelist]] （* [[1767]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|5|11|7|10|6|12|11|1106}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 6th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1578]] [[December 4]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] の水軍が[[毛利氏]] と海戦。[[毛利水軍]] を破る
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1717]] [[December 8]] ） - [[長久保赤水]] 、[[地理学]] 者・[[漢学者]] （+ [[1801]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kempo (era)|Kempo]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1214]] [[December 8]] ） - [[佐々木高綱]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1160]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1848]] [[December 1]] ） - [[曲亭馬琴]] （滝沢馬琴）、[[Novelist]] （* [[1767]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|5|11|7|10|6|12|11|1106}}

[[1160]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1848]] [[December 1]]） – [[Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. [[1767]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1578|1578]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]]’s naval forces engage the [[:en:Mōri clan|Mōri clan]] in battle and defeat the [[Mōri navy]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1717|1717]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[Nagakubo Sekisui]] (長久保赤水), geographer and Confucian scholar (d. [[:en:1801|1801]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenpō (era)|Kenpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1214|1214]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[:en:Sasaki Takatsuna|Sasaki Takatsuna]] (佐々木高綱), samurai of the late Heian and early Kamakura period (b. [[:en:1160|1160]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – [[:en:Kyokutei Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. [[:en:1767|1767]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1717|1717]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[Nagakubo Sekisui]] (長久保赤水), geographer and Confucian scholar (d. [[:en:1801|1801]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenpō (era)|Kenpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1214|1214]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[:en:Sasaki Takatsuna|Sasaki Takatsuna]] (佐々木高綱), samurai of the late Heian and early Kamakura period (b. [[:en:1160|1160]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – [[:en:Kyokutei Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840283]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 6|qq=November 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō]] 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1578|1578]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]]’s naval forces engage the [[:en:Mōri clan|Mōri clan]] in battle and defeat the [[Mōri navy]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1717|1717]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[Nagakubo Sekisui]] (長久保赤水), geographer and Confucian scholar (d. [[:en:1801|1801]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenpō (era)|Kenpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1214|1214]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]） – [[:en:Sasaki Takatsuna|Sasaki Takatsuna]] (佐々木高綱), samurai of the late Heian and early Kamakura period (b. [[:en:1160|1160]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1848|1848]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]]） – [[:en:Kyokutei Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. [[:en:1767|1767]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初六]][[zh:十一月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|November 6|qq=November 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1578|en|1578|WD=Q6707|lt=1578}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}’s naval forces engage the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|WD=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan}} in battle and defeat the [[Mōri navy]].
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1717|en|1717|WD=Q6895|lt=1717}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}） – [[Nagakubo Sekisui]] (長久保赤水), geographer and Confucian scholar (d. {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801}}).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenpō (era)|Kenpō]] 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1214|en|1214|WD=Q5358|lt=1214}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}） – {{ill|Sasaki Takatsuna|en|Sasaki Takatsuna|WD=Q3473770|lt=Sasaki Takatsuna}} (佐々木高綱), samurai of the late Heian and early Kamakura period (b. {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1}}） – [[:en:Kyokutei Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. {{ill|1767|en|1767|WD=Q7672|lt=1767}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|5|11|7|10|6|12|11|1106|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初六]]

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1578|en|1578|WD=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4|1=December 4}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}’s naval forces engage the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|WD=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} in battle and defeat the [[Mōri navy]].
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1717|en|1717|WD=Q6895|lt=1717|1=1717}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}） – [[Nagakubo Sekisui]] (長久保赤水), geographer and Confucian scholar (d. {{ill|1801|en|1801|WD=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kenpō (era)|Kenpō]] 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1214|en|1214|WD=Q5358|lt=1214|1=1214}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}） – {{ill|Sasaki Takatsuna|en|Sasaki Takatsuna|WD=Q3473770|lt=Sasaki Takatsuna|1=Sasaki Takatsuna}} (佐々木高綱), samurai of the late Heian and early Kamakura period (b. {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|WD=Q7647|lt=1848|1=1848}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}}） – [[:en:Kyokutei Bakin|Kyokutei Bakin]] (滝沢馬琴), novelist and author of *Nansō Satomi Hakkenden* (b. {{ill|1767|en|1767|WD=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}}).
